channel.title: morningNewsLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kid Dragons and Knight Owls: Five Must-Read Fantasy Picture Books
item.description: Fantasy picture books are having a bit of a moment. Here are five excellent picks that will create fans both young and not-so-young.

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: Meet Your Match: Spring Dresses & Perfectly Paired Bags

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
Goblin Market? In This Economy? Five Cautionary Tales About Shopping
item.description: To market, to market: enjoy these five fun stories of shopping and destinies.

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
I Wrote Myself Into Being: JAMES by Percival Everett
item.description: A deep dive into Percival Everett's award-winning novel, a layered, intellectual read and genuine page turner.

item.title: Cozy Fantasy Romance for Hard Times
item.description: Take a break from reality. Enter a magical cat shelter, open up a garden shop, or board a fantastical train with these cozy fantasy romances.

item.title: Baked Sweet Hawaiian Chicken
item.description: I’m updating my “Tuesday night dinner that feels like we’re in Hawaii” with double the sauce! You guys asked, so…

item.title: Ohio Bill Could Force State to Shut Down Troubled Residential Treatment Facilities
item.description: The proposal comes just months after The Marshall Project - Cleveland exposed violence at a residential youth facility northeast of Columbus.

item.title: How North Carolina Officials Kept the Truth About a Police Shooting Hidden
item.description: In 2019, a state trooper killed Brandon Webster, claiming self-defense. Evidence contradicted that account but wasn’t made public — until now.

item.title: The Message Behind This ‘Hamilton’-Style Prison Rap? Pride Can Be Dangerous
item.description: Written by a man at Sing Sing prison, ‘Pride’ is a highlight of the first album by famed prison program Musicambia.

item.title: More Cities Sending Mental Health Workers Instead of Police, But Funding Doubts Remain
item.description: More than 40 of the largest U.S. cities have launched some alternative response, but questions remain about how to pay for it.

item.title: A Prison Barber Class That Makes Men Learn Box Braids, Wet Sets and Other Women’s Styles
item.description: At New York’s Green Haven lockup, student barbers must overcome their machismo — and annoyance — to sharpen their craft.
